subject: Re: Jean Luc's LoC
body:
yes did they draw down any... that is the most
important detail

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

>  
> According to Rich Kahn,  the the Letter of Credit
> (LC) with JPM in the amount 
> of $200,000 on behalf of  Karin Models expires
> 04/14/06.  We can renew at 
> anytime by writing a letter  signed by JE.  The
> annual cost is $2,000 and the 
> Beneficiary is Mellon  United National Bank.   
> Please let me know if  you need any additional
> information. 
> Darren
>

body_html:
yes did they draw down any... that is the most
important detail

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

According to Rich Kahn, the the Letter of Credit
(LC) with JPM in the amount
of $200,000 on behalf of Karin Models expires
04/14/06. We can renew at
anytime by writing a letter signed by JE. The
annual cost is $2,000 and the
Beneficiary is Mellon United National Bank.
Please let me know if you need any additional
information.
Darren
